target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible large sections of exterior wall and roof missing; exposed brickwork and structural elements; multiple windows blown out; damage concentrated on central portion of building; consistent with 45-75% area damaged per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED), showing large sections of exterior wall and roof missing, exposed brickwork, and multiple blown-out windows concentrated on its central portion. The overall scene depicts a heavily damaged multi-story building viewed from behind a guardrail, with additional ruined structures visible in the background. The likely functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and habitability for the assessed building.
